name: Jhon Mcneil Magtibay
title: Full Stack Developer
about: Hi! I'm Mcneil, a full-stack developer focused on backend development. I build efficient, scalable, and secure server-side applications while keeping the front-end experience smooth and reliable. I enjoy solving complex problems and creating systems that are practical and easy to use.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology major in Business Analytics
education.institution: Batangas State University The National Engineering School - Mabini Campus
Anselmo A. Sandoval Memorial National High School

experiences.description: Developing e-commerce web applications using Node.js and Express. Collaborated with frontend developers to integrate APIs and ensure seamless data flow.

Competed in the 1st Mayoral Hackathon organized by the Naga City Local Government. Developed a web application using React Native, achieving top 5 finalist in the category of health among 100+ teams that participated in the hackathon.
